nasb.text: Deacons must be husbands of only one wife, and good managers of their children and their own households.

esv.text: Let deacons each be the husband of one wife, managing their children and their own households well.

cnv.text: 執事只可以作一個妻子的丈夫，善於管理兒女和自己的家。

ccb.text: 执事只能有一位妻子，他要管好自己的儿女和自己的家。

csbs.text: 做执事的只可做一个妇人的丈夫，好好带领儿女和自己的家。
